entry.title: Baby Grayson-Wayne (Batcest Baby #1)
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,326Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 32

Summary: Dick Grayson delivers their first baby and things are beginning to change for him and the Batfamily.He will face past lovers and the new public opinion on him while learning how to be a father with his partners.Damian is 17, Dick is 27, Bruce is 50 (physically de-aged from the previous Part), Jason is 25 and Tim is 21.{Tags will update with chapters}

entry.summary:
Author: Katsukixxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,355Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 17

Summary: Ch.1A beautiful summer day, the Bat-Family headed to the oceanside. Cold drinks, beach volleyball, splashing around, and surfing—all the quintessential beach activities. entry.title: The Shared Lust Of Being A Robin
entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,239Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: Bruce has been missing for several weeks. Everyone is on edge - Damian knows it, as he’s stepped up in Bruce’s absence. He decides to help relieve the stress of his past Robins.Dick learns how good it feels to be “taken care of” by their oldest brother - and Tim and Jason show him the ropes. entry.title: A Storm That Took Everything
entry.summary:
Author: vampirekiki

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 53,928Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 159

Summary: Richard Grayson wished to start a new life. He left Gotham and relocated to Blüdhaven, but the ever-extending shadows of his family still loomed over him even after he abandoned his duty to his kins and his position in the Wayne Family: a well-respected elite household in public; one of the most powerful crime families in the Gotham underworld in secret.

entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,129Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 68

Summary: Second trimester of Dick's baby with Bruce.Dick starts to recover from the strain the first trimester put him through, starts seeing the changes on his body and he doesn't know why it makes him feel so strange. Guilt for not being intimate with his partners hurts his relationship but Bruce, Jason, Tim and Damian show him how much they love him regardless.(Tags will be added/edited as I update chapters, reading the previous parts will help you understand their relationship, and this is your DEAD DOVE warning)Enjoy!

entry.title: Devotion
entry.summary:
Author: Dickcest

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,797Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: "Are you ready?" Dick asked as he stepped back into the room after too many minutes. Damian had stayed right where he had been left. Patience looked so good on him."Yes," Damian answered, not looking up.Fuck Dick has missed this."Up," he ordered, holding his hand out.Damian stood gracefully, as lithe as ever. Silent as a mouse he came over to Dick willingly. It always had to be willing, always had to be Damian's choice to give himself over. It was the agreement.

entry.title: Birthday Gift
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,497Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 170

Summary: Damian's eighteenth birthday is a pretty quiet affair. Just family, a couple of his friends from school, a couple of his super friends. Dick drives up from Bludhaven with a gift. All through dinner, through cake and gifts, all eyes are on Damian. His family's more than others. Bruce watches him with a hooded gaze. Jason like a cat watching a mouse. Tim hovers close, hungry. But Damian gravitates toward Dick. Lets Dick ruffle his hair and pull him against his side and kiss his cheek. None of the other guests think anything of it. Dick's always been open with his affection. Damian tolerates it. So when the party is over and the guests leave, it's Dick he lets trail after him to his bedroom._____Damian is eighteen. Dick has been waiting a long time.

entry.title: Mission: Get Dick Pregnant
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,151Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 108

Summary: Dick gets shot during a mission and a doctors tells Bruce he's had a miscarriage. This is 2 months after the sex pollen thing but Dick didn't know about it.Bruce is feeling guilty for everything that's happened, and when Dick feels better and goes back home, they all have A Very Important Talk.Turns out, after a lot of thinking, Dick wants to try to get pregnant... this time intentionally. And he wants Bruce to reverse his vasectomy!How will this affect their lives? How will their friends and other heroes act when it's known a few intimate details about their whole relationship?
